body.text: The useful way to read technology news is to ask what changes for builders and operators: platform control, infrastructure cost, data boundaries, security exposure, and product leverage.

items: Clear your calendar, Drupal user: You have a critically urgent patch to install
Using AI to write better code more slowly
A successful Japanese trial of a ramjet engine designed for Mach‑5 aircraft
El Paso leaders to weigh ending incentives for future hyperscale data centers - KFOX (KFOX)

body.text: The first-order story is rarely enough. A professional reading asks whether the news changes deployment risk, developer behavior, enterprise buying cycles, cloud economics, or the trust boundary around automation.

body.alt: Image from source article for A successful Japanese trial of a ramjet engine designed for Mach‑5 aircraft
body.caption: A successful Japanese trial of a ramjet engine designed for Mach‑5 aircraft
body.sourceTitle: A successful Japanese trial of a ramjet engine designed for Mach‑5 aircraft

body.text: The strongest technical teams will treat these signals as prompts for better architecture decisions, not as reasons to chase every fashionable tool.
